channel.title: Azure Arc on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Arc on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Expanding Azure Arc SQL Migration with SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines
item.description:
Azure Arc SQL migration now supports SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines as a target. Arc-enabled SQL Server instances can be migrated to either Azure SQL Managed Instance or SQL Server on Azure infrastructure using the same migration solution.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: OpenTelemetry Metrics, Visualizations, and Enhanced Monitoring in Azure Monitor for Azure VMs and Arc Servers
item.description:
Azure Monitor for Azure VMs and Arc Servers now generally available with OpenTelemetry metrics and visualizations, providing a unified monitoring experience. The release consolidates key monitoring capabilities into a single experience.

  • Source: Azure Updates
